title: 1800ML Glass Teapot, Cold Water Kettle, High Borosilicate Glass Material, Removable Stainless Steel Filter, Heat Resistant, Can Be Heated on Open Flame, Suitable for Brewing Loose Tea, Flower Tea
features: 🫖【High-Quality Material】This glass teapot is made of high-quality borosilicate glass and comes with a stainless steel filter and lid. It is sturdy and durable, safe and secure, rust-proof and safe to use.

🫖【Open Flame Heating】This glass teapot can be heated on an open flame. Its high borosilicate material is sturdy and heat-resistant. It can be heated by an electric tea kettle, alcohol lamp or candle, which is perfect for long-term drinking.

🫖【Easy To Use】This glass teapot has a capacity of 1800 ml, which is both easy to use and stylish, with a large opening for easy pouring of tea leaves. The eagle-shaped spout is easy to clean and prevents tea dripping from overflowing.
🫖【Removable Filter】The filter of this glass teapot is removable. It can be inserted to isolate tea leaves when brewing. When used as a cold water kettle, it can be removed for faster pouring.
🫖【Great Gift】This high-quality glass teapot comes with a colorful gift box. It is an ideal gift for tea lovers and a thoughtful gift for family, friends or colleagues.
description: Specifications: Product Name: Glass Teapot Material: Borosilicate Glass, Stainless Steel Color: Transparent Size: 1.8L Quantity: 1 piece Features: You will receive a glass teapot with a capacity of 1800 ml. It is made of high borosilicate glass, which has excellent heat resistance and can be heated on an open flame, such as an electric tea kettle or alcohol lamp. Be careful not to overheat the teapot to avoid burning the handle, and do not touch the body of the teapot when heating. With this large-capacity glass teapot, you can meet your daily drinking and party drinking. You can make tea at home, the large capacity allows you to not have to add water repeatedly, and the wide and thick handle makes pouring water easy, which is an ideal choice for entertaining guests. This glass teapot is very easy to clean. Its wide and smooth spout has no dead corners to prevent scale accumulation. Its wide diameter allows you to reach your hand directly into it to clean it and keep it clean. The stainless steel filter of this glass teapot is extremely fine, with a diameter of only 1 mm and a length of more than half the body of the pot. In this way, you can enjoy the aroma of tea without adding a lot of water. Package Included: 1 Glass Teapot Note: 1. Dimensions are manually measured and may vary by 1-3 mm. 2. Due to different lighting conditions and screen settings, the actual color may vary slightly from the picture. 3. The material is glass, please keep it out of reach of children to avoid breakage and injury.
